pitchEn: A 1-vs-1 turn-based fighting game where your randomly assigned hero battles across 10 levels. Land basic hits and discover each hero hidden 4-key special combo to unleash powerful attacks.
newFeaturesEn: First release of Ring Duel: 1-vs-1 turn-based combat over 10 levels with hidden special-move combos and a local leaderboard in 15 languages.

dataHandling.notes: Fully offline standalone game. No accounts, no network. Only a self-entered nickname, score and language are stored on-device.

reviewerRemarksEn: Launch the app; on first run choose a language and tap Start, then press Start/Begin in the menu. Fight turn by turn: pick a basic attack, or try key combinations to discover the hero's hidden special move. No account, login, or internet is required; it runs entirely offline and only asks for an optional leaderboard name.
